# OutreachOS

> Personal lead vault for cold outreach. Import Excel prospects, keep them private per account, dial with call scripts beside the list.

## Site

- Home: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/
- Pricing: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/pricing
- Import guide: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/import-guide
- Sign up: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/signup
- Login: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/login
- Demo: from the home page (shared sample vault, limited)

## Product

Built for people who run their own outreach. Not a shared team CRM by default — each account owns its pool.

Includes:
- Excel / CSV import (flexible column names)
- Filters by niche, country, call status
- Sticky call-script notes while dialing
- Optional weekly dial quests

## Pricing

- Free: up to 500 leads; 10 Excel imports / day; 200 rows / file
- Premium: unlimited leads; 30 import files / hour; up to 3000 rows / hour
  - ₹1499 / month or $15 / month
- Buy: request from `/pricing` (email includes your username). Manual payment instructions by reply.

## Operator

Techxtreme · support: techxtremebuisness@gmail.com
